name: Blue Flame
description: Blue Flame honors a true Salt Flat Legend! A superior, robust dark roast with Peruvian, Colombian and other Latin American Coffee. With 50% more caffeine, you'll gain exceptional focus and power, just like The Blue Flame!

name: Bonneville Kraken
description: Beware of the Kraken! Bonneville Kraken is a special blend created to attack you with 187% the caffeine of your normal cup of coffee! Unlike most 'highly caffeinated' blends, the flavor of Kraken is ABSOLUTELY AMAZING! Our extremely small batch process may take a lot more time, effort and energy, but we think you are worth it!

name: Copacabana Beach Blend
description: This blend of Brazilian and other Latin American Coffee is loaded with 50% more caffeine than your typical cup of coffee so you can keep the good times rolling. When the occasion calls for you to turn it up, this is the coffee you need in your cup.

name: Hell's Gate Roast
description: If you are looking for a coffee that makes you want to get out of bed in the morning you need look no further. Kenya produces some of the best coffee in the world and we are honored to bring it to you. Roasted in small batches by artisans that have a passion for good coffee and roast it for people who will accept nothing but the best.

name: Blue Nile Roast
description: The origin of coffee comes from the highlands of Ethiopia. This unique soil and climate makes Ethiopian coffee imitated but never duplicated. Roasted in small batches, without automation, by artisan roasters who have a passion for coffee and roast it for people who know what good coffee is and will accept nothing less.

name: Trailhead Roast
description: Whether or not our souls take us one way or another, the one thing that brings almost everyone together, is a great cup of coffee! Life Caffeinated, Coffee Elevated. Our artisans use small-batch roasting without automation for discerning coffee enthusiasts who reject compromises on quality.

name: Salt Flat Shiner - Cask Coffee
description: A premium, dry barrel-aged whole bean coffee with rich oak and a smokey sweet mix of vanilla, brown sugar, honey, and caramel. Amazing flavors of your favorite liquor mixed with the best coffee this great state has to offer. Whole bean only.
